candidate_definition_hints.text: Preact Signals: Supercharge your React/Preact development! Unleash the power of reactive programming with hooks, components, a TanStack query adapter, and more. Code smarter, not harder
Goal of the project to provide comprehensive tooling for using [`preact/signals`](https://github.com/preactjs/signals)
